UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff George Middleton is present
Attorney Michael Hall appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Phillip Hamilton and Regina Hamilton are present.
Attorney Kelly Dermody representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of APR-23-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
